message:
fix(runtime): prevent thread-local teardown aborts in async test harnesses (ft-2worp)

Two-part fix for "fatal runtime error: thread local panicked on drop" aborts:

1. runtime_compat.rs: Stop eagerly clearing ASUPERSYNC_HANDLE in block_on().
   The handle holds an Arc and is safe to leave in TLS; clearing it caused
   the Runtime's Drop to panic when accessing already-destroyed thread-locals.

2. 46 run_async_test functions: Wrap runtime.block_on() and drop(runtime)
   in catch_unwind to absorb TLS destructor panics from asupersync during
   shutdown, matching the existing safe pattern in runtime.rs:3386-3401.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
